raw_cv_text:
Arjun Patel
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: arjun.patel@gmail.com | LinkedIn: arjun-patel-data-eng | GitHub: ArjunPatel | https://arjun.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MSc Computer Science (Distributed Systems) 2018-2019
Thesis on low-latency event stream processing: achieved 45ms end-to-end latency on Kafka clusters
with 2.3M events/sec throughput
Distinction grade (GPA 3.91/4.0); recipient of the Shell Technology Fellowship; led the Distributed
Systems reading group with 32 members
University of Amsterdam | BSc Computer Science (Algorithms & Data Systems) 2015-2018
Summa cum laude (GPA 3.87/4.0); published 1 peer-reviewed paper on time-series compression in
streaming contexts
President of the Data Science Club (200+ members); mentored 15 junior developers in systems
design fundamentals
EXPERIENCE
Datadog | Senior Data Engineer — Streaming Infrastructure 2022-Present
Architected and deployed real-time metric aggregation pipeline processing 8.2B events/day across
50+ Kafka clusters; reduced query latency from 2.8s to 340ms (88% improvement) for dashboard
refreshes serving 15K+ customers
Led migration of legacy batch ETL to Apache Flink-based stateful processing, cutting infrastructure
costs by $2.1M annually and improving metric freshness from 5min to <500ms for 97% of ingestion
paths
Designed and open-sourced custom Kafka consumer group rebalancer reducing rebalance time from
18s to 2.1s, preventing 4-hour monthly data freshness windows; adopted internally and by 12+
companies (800+ GitHub stars)
Stripe | Data Engineer — Payment Streams 2020-2022
Built production streaming pipeline (Kafka + Flink) ingesting 650K transactions/sec with exactly-
once semantics; detected and prevented $47M in fraudulent transactions annually via real-time ML
model serving with <120ms latency
Optimized stream join operations across 8 billion daily payment events, reducing state store memory
footprint by 62% (from 840GB to 319GB per node) and enabling 40% larger transaction volume
capacity per cluster
Mentored team of 6 junior engineers on distributed systems best practices; conducted 18 technical
interviews and promoted 3 individuals to senior roles; drove 15+ architectural design reviews
Wise (TransferWise) | Data Engineer — Real-Time Analytics 2019-2020
Engineered real-time settlement pipeline processing 125K cross-border transfers/hour with sub-
second latency; improved settlement accuracy from 99.2% to 99.97% using custom fraud detection
stream processors
Reduced data warehouse refresh cycle from 6 hours to 4 minutes by migrating CDC pipeline from
Logstash to Kafka Connect with Debezium, unlocking 24/7 real-time reporting for Finance and Risk
teams
Implemented comprehensive monitoring and alerting for 18 critical data pipelines using Prometheus
and custom Kafka metric exporters; achieved 99.98% uptime SLA and reduced MTTR from 35min to
8min
Thoughtworks | Software Engineer — Data Infrastructure 2017-2019
Developed internal streaming data platform using Apache Kafka and Apache Spark; onboarded 12
cross-functional teams and reduced data pipeline development time from 3 weeks to 3 days via
reusable abstractions
Designed schema evolution strategy for event streams supporting 30+ event types with
backward/forward compatibility; reduced production incidents related to schema mismatches by
100% (from 8/quarter to 0)
Authored technical blog posts and internal documentation on stream processing patterns; reached
45K+ readers and contributed to 4 tech talks at company conferences
PROJECTS
FlowSync | Kotlin, Kafka, Apache Flink, RocksDB, Docker 2021-2023
Open-source framework for building exactly-once streaming pipelines with automatic state
management and checkpointing; 2,100+ GitHub stars, 180+ forks, 45K downloads/month on Maven
Central
Benchmarked throughput at 1.8M events/sec per node with sub-100ms latency tail percentiles (p99);
reduced boilerplate code for new pipeline development by 70% compared to raw Flink APIs
RiverTelemetry | Go, Prometheus, ClickHouse, TimescaleDB 2022-Present
High-performance metrics collection agent for distributed systems; 650+ GitHub stars, used in
production by 200+ companies to monitor 50K+ services globally
Achieves <5% CPU overhead with lock-free ring buffers; sends telemetry at 100K metrics/sec with
<50ms latency; reduced disk I/O by 85% vs. competing solutions (Telegraf, collectd)
PipelineSync | Python, SQLAlchemy, PyArrow, Airflow, S3 2019-2021
Data pipeline testing and validation framework supporting incremental validation; 920+ GitHub stars,
adopted by 35+ organizations; reduces testing time from 2 hours to 8 minutes for 100GB datasets
Integrates schema validation, row-level hashing, and statistical drift detection; caught 99.2% of data
quality regressions in production pipelines when applied as pre-deployment checks
EXTRACURRICULAR
Apache Kafka Community | Contributor & KIP Review Committee Member 2020-Present
Contributed 12 pull requests merged into core Kafka codebase, including KIP-694 (transaction
coordinator improvements); reviews averaged 3.2 PRs/week across 8+ KIPs affecting millions of
users
Co-authored technical RFC for stream recovery optimization adopted by Confluent engineering;
improvements reduce bootstrap time by 40% for 10TB+ clusters
Data Engineering Europe Conference | Speaker & Workshop Organizer 2021-2023
Delivered 3 keynote talks on 'Streaming at Scale' reaching 1,200+ attendees at conferences in Berlin,
Amsterdam, London; talks averaged 4.8/5.0 rating with 80K+ YouTube views combined
Designed and led 2-day hands-on workshop on production Kafka architectures; mentored 60+
engineers; 92% completion rate with post-workshop survey showing 8.9/10 satisfaction score
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Kotlin, Go, SQL, Scala, Java
Technologies – Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, Spark Streaming, Apache Beam, Debezium, Airflow,
ClickHouse, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS (S3, Kinesis, EC2), GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow)
Tools – Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Git, Prometheus, Grafana, DataDog, Jira, Confluence
name: Arjun Patel

projects.name: FlowSync
projects.subtitle: Kotlin, Kafka, Apache Flink, RocksDB, Docker
